payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with raised rectangular panels and visible wood grain, cut off at the right edge of the crop and sitting adjacent to a light granite countertop; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m).
